login.title: Sign in | {brand}
login.description: Sign in to your {brand} account to access your workspace, fleet data, and insights.

register.title: Create account | {brand}
register.description: Create a {brand} account to connect data sources and explore fleet and business insights.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password | {brand}
forgotPassword.description: Request a secure link to reset your {brand} account password.

resetPassword.title: Reset password | {brand}
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password to regain access to your {brand} account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email | {brand}
verifyEmail.description: Confirm your email address to finish setting up your {brand} account.

terms.title: Terms of Service | {brand}
terms.description: Terms of Service for using the {brand} platform and related services.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | {brand}
privacy.description: How {brand} collects, uses, and protects personal and fleet-related data.

help.title: Help & support | {brand}
help.description: Get help signing in, verifying your email, or contacting {brand} support.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.lastUpdated: Last updated: April 2026. This page is a placeholder; replace with counsel-approved terms before production launch.
terms.section1Body: By accessing or using {brand} services, you agree to follow these terms and all applicable laws. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.section2Body: You are responsible for safeguarding your credentials and for activity under your account. Notify support immediately if you suspect unauthorized access.
terms.section3Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated through the product or by email where appropriate.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lastUpdated: Last updated: April 2026. This page is a placeholder; replace with counsel-approved privacy disclosures before production launch.
privacy.section1Body: We process information you provide (such as account and fleet data) to operate, secure, and improve the platform. Categories and purposes will be detailed in your final policy.
privacy.section2Body: We apply administrative, technical, and organizational measures designed to protect personal data. Retention follows your configuration, legal obligations, and operational needs.
privacy.section3Body: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or export personal data. Contact support to exercise applicable rights.

help.title: Help & support
help.description: Need help signing in, verifying your email, or resetting your password? Use the options below or contact our team.
help.hoursNote: Support hours and response targets depend on your subscription and region.

featureFlags.title: Feature flags
featureFlags.liveDescription: Default and resolved values come from Postgres via admin.featureFlags.list (createFeatureFlagService) for your signed-in tenant.

onboarding.title: Welcome aboard
onboarding.subtitle: A short guided setup for your workspace.
onboarding.stepWelcomeBody: You are ready to connect data sources and explore insights.
onboarding.stepPreferencesBody: Locale, currency, and notifications will be driven by TenantConfig once connected.
onboarding.stepDoneBody: You can revisit settings anytime from the app.
